Open Studio
Home/Free browser DAW
Free browser DAW

Make hip-hop, trap and drill beats in a complete online music studio.

MusicStudioLab connects drum sequencing, piano-roll composition, playlist arrangement, sound design, mixing, automation, mastering and offline WAV export in one browser project.

Production workspaces

Move from the first drum pattern to a finished WAV without leaving the session.

Every workspace edits the same tracks, patterns, instruments, routing and automation, so changes remain connected throughout the production process.

Channel Rack

Program kick, snare, clap, hat, percussion, 808 and instrument patterns on a fast step sequencer.

Piano Roll

Draw notes, chords, melodies, basslines, velocities and note lengths on a pitched editing grid.

Playlist

Arrange patterns into intros, verses, hooks, drops, bridges and complete song structures.

Mixer

Balance tracks and shape them with filters, EQ, compression, saturation, chorus, delay and reverb.

Automation

Draw 64-step movement for volume, pan, cutoff, sends and four Synth Lab performance macros.

Master & Export

Use master EQ, glue compression, clipping and a safe ceiling before rendering the arrangement to WAV.

Built for modern beat production

Sequence drums quickly, then keep full control over the sound.

Start with 444 original WAV assets and 240 editable layered synthesizer patches, or initialize a clean instrument and design a new sound from oscillators, filters, envelopes, modulation and effects.

  • Tuned 808s and original drum one-shots
  • Three oscillators, sub, noise, FM and ring modulation
  • Pattern sequencing and pitched note editing
  • Track inserts, sends and master processing
  • Local project saves and portable project files
  • Offline WAV rendering with automation applied

Browser requirements

Use a current desktop browser with JavaScript and Web Audio enabled. Audio begins after a user action. MIDI note input depends on browser and device support.

Large projects and offline renders require enough device memory. Save portable project files before clearing browser data or moving to another device.

Open the workstation

Start a new beat with the full production interface.

The interactive studio loads after this search-friendly overview and keeps all production tools inside the browser.

Design original sounds, sequence patterns, arrange songs, mix channels, automate movement, and render WAV masters directly in a modern browser.
